message:
refactor(cli): Use getHomeDir() in interactive and utilities commands

Complete the migration from hardcoded homedir() calls to the testable
getHomeDir() function that respects JFP_HOME env var. Also removed
unused config imports from skills.test.ts.

Changes:
- interactive.ts: Use getHomeDir() for skill installation path
- utilities.ts: Use getHomeDir() in doctor command
- skills.test.ts: Remove unused loadConfig/createDefaultConfig imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
